message:
refactor: standardize error handling with FatalError wrappers (bd-qioh)

Convert direct fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr)+os.Exit(1) patterns to FatalError(),
FatalErrorWithHint() in delete.go, ship.go, mol_distill.go, find_duplicates.go,
show_thread.go. Scope note: ~400 remaining call sites across 50+ files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
